name: Start.io
description: Mobile SDK-based ad platform (formerly StartApp) for app monetization and audience intelligence.

seo.title: Start.io — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Start.io: Mobile SDK-based ad platform (formerly StartApp) for app monetization and audience intelligence.

when_to_use: In-app ad monetization for Android and iOS developers
Audience intelligence and behavioral segmentation for UA
StartApp SDK integration for app monetization campaigns

pros: Long-running mobile SDK with broad integration
cons: StartApp brand legacy carries quality baggage
review.verdict: Legacy mobile ad player still alive, useful as secondary fill but not a primary monetization engine.
review.best_for: Apps wanting additional waterfall fill, especially in tier-2 and tier-3 geos.
review.not_for: Premium publishers who care about brand-safe tier-1 demand quality.
